_comment: Publicly-reported / suspected insider wallets. The scanner FORCE-ENRICHES these every tick (priority, never evicted) so they get a full on-chain record, then scores them with the SAME detector suite as everything else — they publish ONLY if they independently clear the bar (no special treatment, no fabricated flags). Add an entry to put a wallet on the force-scored list.
